name: user-research-for-ai-config
description: Use this skill when the user wants to build a personalized AI configuration through structured self-interview rather than copying templates. Two outputs: (A) Principles document — CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / CODEX.md / .cursorrules / system-prompt for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode etc. (B) Custom skill package — design from scratch OR extract an existing recurring task into a reusable SKILL.md; works whether the user already knows what skill they want or needs AI to help discover one. AI-driven inference: asks about user's actual tasks (not technical architecture), infers right form using Anthropic's 5 shapes (atomic / orchestration / with-subagents / plugin-with-hooks / composite-plugin) with 6-segment proposal + 5-option feedback. Trigger: 我的 principles / 自己的 skill / 个性化 AI / 帮我设计一个 skill / build my own CLAUDE.md / design a skill from scratch / AI that understands me. Do NOT use for customer research, product discovery, market research.
